language: class Solution: def calculateSpan(self, arr): span = [1] * len(arr) stack = [] for i, price in enumerate(arr): while stack and arr[stack[-1]] <= price: span[i] += span[stack[-1]] stack.pop() stack.append(i) return span
problemTitle: PYTHON code:class Solution: def calculateSpan(self, arr): n = len(arr) st = [] ans =[] for i in range(n): while st and arr[st[-1]] <= arr[i]: st.pop() if not st: ans.append(i + 1) else: ans.append(i - st[-1]) st.append(i) return ans
